# Maturity Ladder

| Level | System behavior |
|---|---|
| 0 | random ads |
| 1 | documented campaigns |
| 2 | hypotheses and measurement |
| 3 | posterior updates |
| 4 | bandits and controlled tests |
| 5 | MMM/lift calibrated budget allocation |
| 6 | autonomous learning memory |
| 7 | market/product feedback loop |
